decision_process: Synthetic eligibility review using an AI recommendation and named human authorization
ai_system_role: The synthetic system retrieves evidence and recommends an eligibility outcome without final authority.

sampling.population_or_record_universe: All twenty synthetic decisions generated for the conformance fixture.
sampling.selection_rule: Review the complete synthetic record universe without sampling.
known_exclusions: No real persons, institutions, or production records are represented.
selection_effects: The fixture demonstrates contract behavior rather than field prevalence.

aggregation.rationale: The assessment reports the dominant operational pattern across the complete synthetic record set.

actors.notes: Synthetic actor used only for executable conformance testing.

assessor.name: Synthetic Fixture Author
assessor.conflict_disclosure: Synthetic repository fixture; no external institution is assessed.

evidence_claims.proposition: The reviewer accessed underlying evidence before each sampled decision.
transformation_history: Generated as a deterministic synthetic fixture.

evidence_claims.proposition: The reviewer could approve, reject, or escalate through an operationally tested mechanism.
transformation_history: Generated as a deterministic synthetic fixture.

evidence_claims.proposition: Reviewer-authored notes documented alternatives and reasons independent of the system recommendation.
transformation_history: Generated as a deterministic synthetic fixture.

evidence_claims.proposition: The assessment packet has declared provenance and a complete synthetic file manifest.
transformation_history: Generated as a deterministic synthetic fixture.

substantive_findings.rationale: The complete synthetic access log records timely review of underlying evidence before each decision.
Synthetic reviewer notes document alternatives and independent reasons capable of changing outcomes.
The authority matrix and deterministic test establish usable approval, rejection, and escalation mechanisms.
A formal appeal route exists, but the fixture does not contain substantive reconsideration or reversal evidence.

substantive_findings.unresolved_proposition: Whether a qualifying harm event occurred and activated a repair obligation.
substantive_findings.search_or_request_summary: The synthetic fixture intentionally omits harm and remediation records.
substantive_findings.rationale: The record cannot establish the Repair trigger, so the dimension remains insufficient evidence.

substantive_findings.unresolved_proposition: Whether a named authority changed the decision architecture in response to a documented failure.
substantive_findings.search_or_request_summary: The fixture contains no declared follow-up period or reform record.
substantive_findings.rationale: Authority, linkage, timing, and implementation of architecture change cannot be determined.

institutional_record_integrity.provenance: Synthetic institutional records have deterministic repository provenance.
institutional_record_integrity.scope_and_completeness: The record set is complete for access, reasoning, and authority but omits repair and reform.
institutional_record_integrity.edit_authority: Repository maintainers control the synthetic records through version control.
institutional_record_integrity.independence: The records are synthetic and do not establish production-system independence.
institutional_record_integrity.tamper_evidence: Git history supplies change traceability but not external cryptographic attestation.
institutional_record_integrity.retention: Retention follows the public repository and tagged release history.
institutional_record_integrity.contradictions: No material internal contradiction appears in the synthetic record set.
institutional_record_integrity.rationale: The records permit bounded fixture findings but do not represent a production institutional record system.

assessment_packet_integrity.provenance: The packet is generated and stored in the public repository.
assessment_packet_integrity.scope_and_completeness: The fixture manifest declares every included synthetic artifact and intentional omission.
assessment_packet_integrity.edit_authority: Repository permissions and Git history disclose authorized changes.
assessment_packet_integrity.independence: The packet is independent of any real governed institution because it is synthetic.
assessment_packet_integrity.tamper_evidence: Git object identifiers provide deterministic content traceability.
assessment_packet_integrity.retention: The packet is retained with the release source archive.
assessment_packet_integrity.contradictions: The packet contains no unresolved material contradiction.
assessment_packet_integrity.rationale: The synthetic packet has declared provenance, scope, transformations, and repository preservation.

summary: Synthetic conformance example demonstrating mixed findings and split Telemetry Integrity.
limitations: Synthetic fixture; no empirical or institutional claim is made.
